violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine in the bar area.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of sliced vegetables in the walk-in cooler and steak and other protiens in the prep top cooler was noted not being properly dated for disposition.
POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of sliced vegetables was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the walk in cooler.
